_comment: Macro-Terrain: Black Tortoise Shell Continent. Per scale directive: this terrain IS a being. Player shouldn't initially realize they're standing on bone. Divine Sense -> Perception changes -> 'You realize this mountain range... is one finger.' Prime Directive: the being's corpse is objectively terrain; perception tier determines what the player sees.
name: Black Tortoise Shell Continent
scale: 1000 li across — the shell of a divine beast that supports a continent.
canonical_event: The Black Tortoise sleeps beneath Xuan Wu; its shell IS the continent.

perception_tiered_appearance.mortal: A continent of black-jade stone, oddly domed, 1000 li across.
perception_tiered_appearance.qi_condensation: The continent feels stable beyond reason; earthquakes never occur here.
perception_tiered_appearance.foundation_establishment: The continent is a single piece of shell; the dome is its curve.
perception_tiered_appearance.core_formation: This is the Black Tortoise's shell; the continent rests on the sleeping divine beast.
perception_tiered_appearance.nascent_soul: The Tortoise slumbers beneath; its breath is the continent's climate.
perception_tiered_appearance.spirit_severing: The Tortoise supports the continent in its slumber; waking it would sink the continent.

perception_mechanic.trigger: When player's perception tier rises, the appearance re-rolls automatically.
perception_mechanic.no_locked_upgrades: A mortal who later reaches Core Formation will see the truth; the terrain does not change, only understanding does.
perception_mechanic.canon_fidelity: This is exactly how Wang Lin perceived Ancient God Tu Si's remains — first as terrain, then as god-bone, then as god-memory.
